continuation_backlog.title: Enforce cooldowns around automated recovery hooks
continuation_backlog.description: Prevent repeated recovery actions from firing too quickly and add tests for the cooldown behavior.
continuation_backlog.commit_message: feature: add recovery hook cooldown protection
